name: Waypoint Reit
analysis: WPR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.4600, stop A$2.3364, target A$2.8308 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
